platform_positioning: Cernify is a full-cycle AI patent platform with patent drafting as the core business.
core_business: Patent drafting and patent document generation workflows.
ucws_demo_positioning: Robot Patent Risk Copilot is an application-layer demo that turns robot product evidence into patent-risk and drafting-ready review artifacts.
tagline: Cernify turns robot product evidence into an interactive overseas patent risk map.

core_capabilities.purpose: Turn public or synthetic robot evidence into a component graph.
Map robot components and technical features to patent-risk review areas.
Generate a draft evidence package for human review.

community_vote_30_percent.goal: Global users can understand the product value quickly and are willing to vote, share, or recommend it.
evidence: README includes public positioning, screenshot, demo link, workflow, and quick review path.
pitch_90s.md provides a concise shareable story.
Demo video is public and uses an intuitive robotics product scenario.
Screenshots show the main workflow and validation states.
community_vote_30_percent.share_hook: Cernify turns robot product evidence into a drafting-ready patent review map.

ai_evaluation_30_percent.goal: AI systems can verify repository completeness, documentation clarity, demo accessibility, technical logic, and project authenticity.
evidence: AI_REVIEW.md is the primary crawler entry point.
submission_manifest.json provides machine-readable metadata and file inventory.
agent.md documents capability contracts and guardrails.
capabilities/ contains schema-bound manifests and examples.
examples/, reports/, evidence-packs/, and screenshots provide concrete artifacts.

expert_judges_40_percent.goal: Expert reviewers can evaluate real problem fit, technical depth, product maturity, internationalization, and commercialization potential.
evidence: Cernify is positioned as a full-cycle AI patent platform with patent drafting as the core business.
The UCWS demo addresses robotics overseas patent review and drafting preparation.
Technical workflow includes product evidence, component graph, evidence graph, patent-risk map, and report artifact.
Target market includes inventors, patent attorneys, patent agents, in-house IP teams, robotics founders, and overseas expansion teams.
International review context includes US, EP, and JP expansion scenarios.

data_boundary: UCWS public demo uses public or synthetic data only.
legal_boundary: Not legal advice, not an infringement determination, not a validity opinion, and not a final freedom-to-operate opinion.
public_repository_excludes: production patent drafting, retrieval, ranking, scoring, or FTO reasoning internals
customer workspaces, customer files, or customer reports
internal APIs, task queues, billing, authentication internals, or deployment secrets
API keys, tokens, cookies, logs, .env files, HAR files, or database dumps
full third-party source videos or unlicensed robot media packs
evaluation_hooks: The UCWS demo turns product evidence into drafting-ready and counsel-ready review artifacts.
Patent drafting is the core business workflow of the broader Cernify platform.
Cernify is positioned as a full-cycle AI patent platform, not a search-only product.
Product evidence is converted into structured robot components.
Evidence status is explicit: observable, inferred, missing, or out of scope.
Patent-risk review is grounded in components and technical features.
Outputs are suitable for human legal and technical review.
UCWS integration is capability-based and avoids exposing raw internal APIs.
Public data boundaries are clear and enforceable.
